title: AN ACT CONVERTING A CERTAIN DISTRICT INTO A BARRIO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYAPO, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1811 / 67 OG No. 39, 7665 (September 27, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6221, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING A CERTAIN DISTRICT INTO A BARRIO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYAPO, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The District No. III of the Municipality of Cuyapo, Province of Nueva Ecija, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as Barrio Latap.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
